div.h2: Algorithm Flow: Restoring Evicted Pages to Physical Memory

ol.li: Atomicity: The PTE Valid bit is the final operation. If a fault occurs before Step 5, the state remains "In Swap".
Coherency: Physical memory is not marked valid until memcpy is fully fenced.
Zero-Fill: If in_swap was false, Step 3 would be memset(dst, 0, PAGE_SIZE).

ul.li: L1/L2 Cache Pressure: High during memcpy.
I/O Wait: Zero (assuming slot is in Kernel buffer cache).
TLB: Hardware automatically refills TLB on next access.
🔴 Red Text: Mutated state / Changed value
